name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra 210W
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra 210W
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra 210W (USW-Ultra-210W) is a compact yet highly capable Layer 2 switch designed for modern, space-constrained network environments. With 8 Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, it provides reliable wired connectivity for offices, retail spaces, and smart home installations. The switch features seven PoE+ ports for powering compatible devices such as access points, IP cameras, and VoIP phones, along with one PoE++ input port that enables flexible power delivery to the switch itself. At its core, the UniFi Switch Ultra 210W delivers consistent and efficient data handling through a powerful non-blocking Layer 2 switching architecture... Power delivery is one of the key strengths of the UniFi Switch Ultra 210W, offering flexible and scalable PoE availability to match a wide range of deployment scenarios. The switch is fully managed via Ethernet using the UniFi Network application (version 8.0.7 or later), enabling centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates.

detailed_description.heading: Compact PoE Switch
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra 210W (USW-Ultra-210W) is a compact yet highly capable Layer 2 switch designed for modern, space-constrained network environments. With 8 Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, it provides reliable wired connectivity for offices, retail spaces, and smart home installations. The switch features seven PoE+ ports for powering compatible devices such as access points, IP cameras, and VoIP phones, along with one PoE++ input port that enables flexible power delivery to the switch itself. Designed with adaptability in mind, the USW-Ultra-210W supports multiple power input methods, including DC input, PoE++, and an external AC/DC adapter (included). Its compact form factor supports desktop, wall, and magnetic mounting, making it easy to deploy in cabinets, under desks, or directly on metal surfaces. Note: PoE input is supported for switch operation, but PoE+/PoE++ input or AC power is required for PoE output.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Network Performance
detailed_description.text: At its core, the UniFi Switch Ultra 210W delivers consistent and efficient data handling through a powerful non-blocking Layer 2 switching architecture. With a switching capacity of 16 Gbps and total non-blocking throughput of 8 Gbps, the switch ensures smooth, congestion-free communication across all connected devices. The switch achieves a forwarding rate of 12 million packets per second (Mpps), enabling fast packet processing for latency-sensitive applications. Support for up to 256 VLANs allows for precise network segmentation. The USW-Ultra-210W is engineered with a rich set of Layer 2 features commonly found in enterprise-class switches. These include STP and RSTP for loop prevention, loop protection, storm control, egress rate limiting, flow control, port isolation, and port mirroring.

detailed_description.heading: UniFi Management
detailed_description.text: Power delivery is one of the key strengths of the UniFi Switch Ultra 210W, offering flexible and scalable PoE availability to match a wide range of deployment scenarios. Each PoE-capable port can deliver up to 30W (PoE+). The total PoE budget varies depending on the power source: 42W with PoE++ input, 16W with PoE+ input, 42W with a 60W PoE adapter, 52W with a 60W AC adapter, and up to 202W when powered by a 210W AC adapter. Despite its capabilities, the switch remains energy-efficient. Maximum power consumption excluding PoE output is just 9W with PoE input or 8W with adapter input. The switch is fully managed via Ethernet using the UniFi Network application (version 8.0.7 or later), enabling centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates.
